chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

(2) “Shipper” means a person who consigns the movement of a shipment.

(3) “Shipper’s certificate of weight” means a document described by Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) .

(4) “Board” means the board of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

(5) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

    (2) “Shipper” means a person who consigns the movement of a shipment.

    (3) “Shipper’s certificate of weight” means a document described by Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) .

    (4) “Board” means the board of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

    (5) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 69, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.
“Shipper” means a person who consigns the movement of a shipment.
“Shipper’s certificate of weight” means a document described by Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) .
“Board” means the board of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.
